race.comment: ORLOVA (6) closed strongly from the back to just miss here three weeks ago. Strips fitter third-up and keeps the 3kg claimer to get her in flyweight. This looks winnable and she is fancied to go and do the business. POSH DIAMANTE (7) finished just behind ORLOVA last time. Has been rock-solid since resuming and finds another good race for her. IMPACT STORM (4) was far from his best last time but was good fresh at Balaklava when missing by a lip. Can bounce back third-up. DARCI LANE (3) lengthened nicely at Strathalbyn on debut to make the perfect start. Keeps Pannell and is drawn to get a cosy run.
